prompt:
Reference image role: the previous Megatron project cover defines the style — dark ink-green base, right-side glowing tech motif, left-side quiet for text overlay, restrained Eastern xianxia + tech fusion. Same color palette, same mood, same composition pattern.

Create a 16:9 project cover image for "CUDA Softmax Kernel". NO text, NO logos.

Subject: A central glowing translucent cube floating in dark space, made of cyan-teal #9CF0BD inner glow with golden grid lines #C0A35D etched on its surface (suggesting GPU compute). Around it, thin curved arrows or geometric flowlines indicate softmax normalization. Tiny firefly motes around the cube. Faint matrix-like dim grid in background. Bottom of frame fades to deep ink-green.

Composition: cube subject on right 60%, left 40% dark and quiet for text overlay. Cinematic, professional, NOT game UI.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, glow #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D, accent jade #6A9580, dark teal #18483E.

Avoid: real company logos, readable text or numbers, characters, neon purple, red, cartoonish, MMORPG, oversaturated.
